case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GONZALEZ, LUIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
COPY OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,427.95 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES REQUEST.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR PETITION MAILED ON DEC 26, 2003
ORDER FOR PETSA SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, LUIS $3,427.95 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,453.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
